com.irurueta.geometry.AffineTransformation2D

Bug Category Details Line Priority
com.irurueta.geometry.AffineTransformation2D.getTranslation() may expose internal representation by returning AffineTransformation2D.translation MALICIOUS_CODE EI_EXPOSE_REP 501 Medium
new com.irurueta.geometry.AffineTransformation2D(double, Rotation2D, double[]) may expose internal representation by storing an externally mutable object into AffineTransformation2D.translation MALICIOUS_CODE EI_EXPOSE_REP2 261 Medium
new com.irurueta.geometry.AffineTransformation2D(double, double[]) may expose internal representation by storing an externally mutable object into AffineTransformation2D.translation MALICIOUS_CODE EI_EXPOSE_REP2 211 Medium
new com.irurueta.geometry.AffineTransformation2D(Matrix, double[]) may expose internal representation by storing an externally mutable object into AffineTransformation2D.translation MALICIOUS_CODE EI_EXPOSE_REP2 186 Medium

new com.irurueta.geometry.AffineTransformation2D(Rotation2D, double[]) may expose internal representation by storing an externally mutable object into AffineTransformation2D.translation MALICIOUS_CODE EI_EXPOSE_REP2 230 Medium
new com.irurueta.geometry.AffineTransformation2D(double[]) may expose internal representation by storing an externally mutable object into AffineTransformation2D.translation MALICIOUS_CODE EI_EXPOSE_REP2 169 Medium
com.irurueta.geometry.AffineTransformation2D.setTranslation(double[]) may expose internal representation by storing an externally mutable object into AffineTransformation2D.translation MALICIOUS_CODE EI_EXPOSE_REP2 516 Medium
